title: Catherine II of Russia becomes Empress of all the Russias
fact: Catherine II, commonly known as Catherine the Great, was the Empress of Russia from 1762 to 1796.

title: Nicholas II of Russia becomes Emperor of all the Russias
fact: Nicholas II was Emperor of Russia, King of Poland and Grand Duke of Finland from 1 November 1894 until his abdication in 1917.

title: Peter the Great becomes Emperor of all the Russias
fact: Peter I was the Tsar of all Russia from 1682 and the first Emperor of Russia from 1721 until his death in 1725.

title: Peter III of Russia becomes Emperor of all the Russias
fact: Peter III Fyodorovich was Emperor of Russia from 5 January 1762 until 9 July of the same year, when he was overthrown by his wife, Catherine II.

title: Alexander II of Russia becomes Emperor of all the Russias
fact: Alexander II was Emperor of Russia, King of Poland, and Grand Duke of Finland from 2 March 1855 until his assassination on 13 March 1881.

title: Alexander III of Russia becomes Emperor of all the Russias
fact: Alexander III was Emperor of Russia, King of Poland and Grand Duke of Finland from 13 March 1881 until his death in 1894.

title: Paul I of Russia becomes Emperor of all the Russias
fact: Paul I was Emperor of Russia from 1796 until his assassination in 1801.

title: Alexander I of Russia becomes Emperor of all the Russias
fact: Alexander I, nicknamed "the Blessed", was Emperor of Russia from 1801, the first King of Congress Poland from 1815, and the Grand Duke of Finland from 1809 to his death in 1825.

title: Nicholas I of Russia becomes Emperor of all the Russias
fact: Nicholas I was Emperor of Russia, King of Poland, and Grand Duke of Finland from 1825 to 1855.

title: Catherine I of Russia becomes Empress of all the Russias
fact: Catherine I was Empress of Russia from 1725 to 1727.

title: Elizabeth I of Russia becomes Empress of all the Russias
fact: Elizabeth or Elizaveta Petrovna was Empress of Russia from 1741 until her death in 1762.

title: Peter II of Russia becomes Emperor of all the Russias
fact: Peter II Alexeyevich was Emperor of Russia from 1727 until 1730, when he died at the age of 14.

title: Anna I of Russia becomes Empress of all the Russias
fact: Anna Ioannovna, also russified as Anna Ivanovna and sometimes anglicized as Anne, served as regent of the Duchy of Courland and Semigallia from 1711 until 1730 and then ruled as Empress of Russia from 1730 to 1740.

title: Ivan VI of Russia becomes Emperor of all the Russias
fact: Ivan VI Antonovich, also known as Ioann Antonovich, was Emperor of Russia from October 1740 until he was overthrown by his cousin Elizabeth Petrovna in December 1741.

title: Grand Duke Michael Alexandrovich of Russia becomes Emperor of all the Russias
fact: Grand Duke Michael Alexandrovich of Russia was the youngest son and fifth child of Emperor Alexander III of Russia and youngest brother of Nicholas II.
